== Notes for [[Item:Q109903|Q109903]] ==

Source 1: http://community.fortunecity.ws/tattooine/spock/67/gen/saadid.htm

Source 2: http://www.maaref-foundation.com/english/library/pro_ahl/imam01_ali/biography_of_imam_ali/002.htm

--------------------
غالب

----

Source:

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ghalib_ibn_Fihr

Is counted among the direct ancestors of the Islamic prophet Muhammad.[1]: 3  In the lineage of Muhammad from Adnan, Fihr precedes Muhammad by ten generations.[1]: 3  He is the son of Fihr ibn Malik who lived in Makkah. He died and was buried in Makkah, which was also his birth place.

----

----

Lineage of Zubayr ibn Awwam who descended from Asad ibn Abd al-Uzza. < [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asad_ibn_Abd_al-Uzza Wikipedia] >

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
